digest.component_or_area: LLM review gate observability sidecars and audit read layer
propositions: Plan-review and code-review sidecars drop parts of the four-pass record (pass-1 evidence/scenarios, non-surfaced finding buckets, and the resolved numeric block_threshold), so the stored audit data is incomplete.
Completion-verification persists a per-criterion audit record only on FAIL; a PASS stores only signed counts, leaving no per-criterion trail for successful closes.
Enrich existing review sidecars in place under new schema versions to durably capture the full four-pass record across all finding buckets including pass-4 coaching.
Raise review-sidecar retention so a ticket's review history is deep enough to audit.
Provide a documented read layer (library, CLI, and MCP) that returns a ticket's full retained audit history and its relates_to-linked code reviews.
Maintain backward compatibility so readers accept both v1 and v2 records with no backfill, and reverting a change restores the prior payload shape.
